description_long: This object is a classic chessboard set on a thick, rectangular base with a polished, dark wood appearance. The playing surface features a standard 8x8 grid of alternating dark and light squares, each with a slightly marbled texture that adds visual depth. The border of the board is wide, solid, and matches the dark wood tone of the base, providing a sturdy and elegant frame. Arranged on the board are two full sets of chess pieces, all rendered in a glossy black material, with each piece intricately detailed and easily distinguishable by shape. The chess pieces are positioned in their traditional starting arrangement, with rooks, knights, bishops, king, queen, and pawns all present. The overall finish is highly reflective, giving the set a luxurious and formal appearance suitable for display in urban parks, plazas, or recreational areas.
description: A polished, dark wood chessboard with a marbled 8x8 grid and glossy black chess pieces in their starting positions. The board features a wide, matching border and a highly reflective, elegant finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set of glossy black chess pieces arranged in their starting positions on the marbled chessboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rows of chess pieces and the thickness of the dark wood base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite set of chess pieces visible and the board's reflective surface prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the rows of chess pieces and the substantial, polished border.
attribute_board_pattern: The board's playing surface consists of a regular grid of alternating dark brown and light gray marbled squares, each square being perfectly square-shaped and arranged in a classic checkerboard pattern. The marbling adds a subtle decorative effect, enhancing the visual richness of the board.
attribute_border_design: The border is wide, solid, and made of dark polished wood, matching the base of the board. It is unornamented, with a smooth, glossy finish and no visible inscriptions or markings.
